Class DataModel.NoPrimaryKeyException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
net.sf.jailer.datamodel.DataModel.NoPrimaryKeyException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DataModel
public static class DataModel.NoPrimaryKeyException extends RuntimeException
Thrown if a table has no primary key.
Author:
Ralf Wisser
